name: EasyLink

releases.author: isitwho
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
- Fixed missing search results caused by punctuation not being stripped (e.g. "word." didn't match "word")
- Fixed "Headers only" toggle overlapping the close (X) button
- Fixed Cmd+Enter opening wrong note when "Headers only" mode was active

## Improvements
- Duplicate result deduplication is now O(n) instead of O(n²)

releases.author: isitwho
releases.description:
### ✨ New Features
- **Optimized Search Engine**: Implemented lazy loading and efficient word-matching logic for faster performance.
- **Enhanced Search UI Indicators**: Added 'H/P' (Heading/Paragraph) type badges with specific heading levels for better context identification.
- **Header-Only Filter**: Added a new toggle switch to filter and display only headings in search results.
- **Code Consolidation**: Performed general code cleanup and refactoring to improve internal compatibility and maintainability.

releases.author: isitwho
releases.description:
### ✨ New Features & Major Improvements
-   **Completely Redesigned Result Modal**: Search results now display a beautiful, theme-aware preview of the content, not just plain text.
-   **Keyword Highlighting**: Your search terms are now highlighted within the preview, making it easy to see why a result is relevant.
-   **Powerful Keyboard Workflow**: Use `Enter` to insert a link and `Ctrl/Cmd + Enter` to open the note in a new tab, all without leaving your keyboard.
-   **Right-Click Menu**: Access EasyLink directly from the editor's context menu for an even faster workflow.

releases.author: isitwho
releases.description:
🎉 **Initial Release of EasyLink!**

This is the first official release of **EasyLink**, a plugin designed to make connecting your notes in Obsidian faster and more intuitive.

### How It Works
Simply select any text in your editor, and EasyLink will instantly find the most similar content from other notes in your vault. You can then create a link to the most relevant heading or block with just a single click.

### Key Features
-   **Contextual Search**: Finds related content based on shared keywords, not just exact matches.
-   **Relevance Scoring**: Ranks results by a similarity score (%) so you always see the most relevant content first.
-   **Precise Linking**: Creates links directly to specific headings or blocks.
-   **Quick Access**: Trigger searches via a handy ribbon icon or the command palette.
-   **Open in New Tab**: `Ctrl/Cmd` + click a result to open the source note directly without inserting a link.
-   **Highly Configurable**:
    -   Exclude folders from search.
    -   Adjust the maximum number of results.
    -   Set a minimum similarity score to filter results.

Thank you for trying out EasyLink! Please report any bugs or suggest features on the [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/isitwho/EasyLink/issues) page.
